WHAT WE SELL

OUR RANGE

No prices, no delivery, no online ordering. Just a clean showcase of what Hoots Fruits serves: fresh juices, smoothies, cold press bottles and fruit pots.

FRESH JUICES

Freshly prepared fruit juices made to keep things bright, natural and refreshing.

SMOOTHIES

Colourful blended smoothies packed with fruit, flavour and feel-good energy.

COLD PRESS

Cold pressed drinks for clean, simple refreshment — no nonsense, just good ingredients.

FRUIT POTS

Fresh fruit pots loaded with colour and texture for a quick healthy pick-me-up.

OUR STYLE

FRESH, NATURAL, REAL.

Hoots Fruits is all about fresh ingredients, cold pressed drinks and tropical energy.

OUR STORY

GOOD INGREDIENTS. NO NONSENSE.

Hoots Fruits brings together fresh juices, smoothies, cold press drinks and fruit pots in a bright tropical style. The brand is playful, colourful and made to feel fresh from top to bottom.

Located inside Don Taco on Uxbridge Road, it is a simple concept: fresh ingredients, natural flavour and a clean feel-good look.
